<!-- source-hash: f85c2a465156beceb7998eac5e9a63a8 -->
Handles mapping between `Organization` domain objects and external REST API DTOs, including single-entity responses, filter option construction, and paginated list responses.

## Key Components

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `toResponse(Organization)` | Delegates to the shared internal mapper to convert an `Organization` document to an `OrganizationResponse` DTO |
| `toFilterOptions(...)` | Builds an `OrganizationFilterOptions` object from raw query parameters (`category`, `minEmployees`, `maxEmployees`, `hasActiveContract`) |
| `toOrganizationsResponse(CountedGenericQueryResult<Organization>)` | Maps a paginated query result into an `OrganizationsResponse` DTO, including the item list, total count, and page info |

## Usage Example

```java
// Injected via Spring
@Autowired
private OrganizationMapper organizationMapper;

// Map a single organization
OrganizationResponse response = organizationMapper.toResponse(organization);

// Build filter options from query params
OrganizationFilterOptions filters = organizationMapper.toFilterOptions(
    "MSP", 10, 500, true
);

// Map a paginated result set
OrganizationsResponse pagedResponse = organizationMapper
    .toOrganizationsResponse(queryResult);
```

## Notes

- Registered as a Spring `@Component` with the qualifier `"externalOrganizationMapper"` to avoid conflicts with the shared `com.openframe.api.mapper.OrganizationMapper`.
- Extends `BaseRestMapper` to inherit pagination utilities used when building `pageInfo`.
- Delegates single-entity mapping to the shared mapper, keeping transformation logic centralised.
